enriched_points.expanded_content: Cultural resistance, stemming from a lack of consumer awareness and traditional business practices, hinders the adoption of circular economy principles in organizations.
Businesses often hesitate to invest in circular practices due to uncertainties regarding returns and the perceived risks associated with new models.
Many companies prioritize immediate profits over sustainable practices, undermining long-term circular strategies that require upfront investment and patience.
